name: Chicken Wings Gumbo Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove and discard wing tips; reserve remaining wings.
2. In a large skillet, cook bacon until browned; remove with a slotted spoon and reserve.
3. Add chicken wings; brown on all sides and remove with a slotted spoon.
4. Add chopped green bell pepper and celery; sauté until crisp-tender, about 3 minutes.
5. Add ground beef; cook, stirring to crumble, until browned.
6. Drain off excess fat; add tomatoes, chicken broth, thyme, allspice, cayenne pepper, and black pepper.
7. Stir together; bring mixture to a simmer, covered, until chicken is almost tender, about 15 minutes.
8. Add lima beans and corn; continue cooking, covered, until chicken and vegetables are fully cooked, about 5 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with reserved bacon pieces and serve over steamed rice.
